name: helixgen
description: Generate Line 6 Helix Stadium .hsp presets from JSON or natural-language tone descriptions. Bundles the /tone skill (drives the helixgen CLI from prompts like '/tone Foo Fighters White Limo lead') and the helixgen MCP server (list-blocks, show-block, list-irs, generate). Requires `pip install helixgen` for the underlying CLI and MCP server module.
